Who We Are

Bridging India's Harvest with Riyadh

AgroFresh is Saudi Arabia's premier importer of authentic Indian vegetables. Based in Azizia, Riyadh, we deliver the tastes and nutrition of India's finest produce daily.

🎯 Our Mission

Deliver the freshest Indian vegetables to every household and restaurant in Saudi Arabia — maintaining the authentic taste of home.

🌟 Our Vision

Become the most trusted name in fresh Indian produce across the GCC — connecting Indian farmers with the Saudi community.

Farm-to-Table Integrity — Direct sourcing from trusted Indian farms.

Daily Fresh Arrivals — Cold-chain logistics from harvest to plate.

Community Commitment — Proudly serving Riyadh's Indian community.

Words to Live By

The Philosophy of Freshness

"

Let food be thy medicine. Every vegetable is nature's gift — we deliver it at its finest.

Our Founding Belief
"

AgroFresh connects India's fields with Riyadh's families — one fresh delivery at a time.

AgroFresh Vision
"

Great cooking begins with the freshest ingredient. We guard that freshness with our name.

AgroFresh Promise

Our Selection

Premium Vegetable Collection

Handpicked, quality-inspected and cold-stored to preserve authentic taste.
